title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Housing.com

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Housing.com
jsonLd.description:
Housing.com has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
